---
title: pyLikeSAS
subtitle: "Handle data in Python the same way you used to handle it in SAS !"

author: Jarda Půlpán
email: pulpanj@volny.cz
date: 20/04/2026

---   

# Documentation Summary

cosi


::: {.list-table}
- - []{colspan=1} Section
  - Chapter
  - Description

- - []{rowspan=2} Introduction
  - [Purpose](Purpose.qmd)    
  - Why pyLikeSAS was created and how it developed

- - [Features](pyLikeSAS.qmd)
  - Summary of the features

- - []{rowspan=4} Usage Guides
  - [Sample Data Set](SampleDataFrame.qmd)
  - Description of the sample dataset used in this tutorial

- - [Working with PdDataSet](WorkingwithPdDataSet.qmd)
  - How‑To: Dataset‑like extension of the pandas DataFrame

- - [Using PdDataSet Options](UsageofPdDataSetoptions.qmd)
  - How‑To: Usage of SAS‑like DataSet options for a pandas‑based dataset

- - [Running Data Step](ImplementationsofDataStep.qmd)
  - How‑To: The data_step Function — pyLikeSAS Implementation of the SAS Data Step
:::
